programme.title: Interview With a Killer
programme.desc: In 2013, the small city of Weatherford, Texas was rocked by the brutal slaying of local son, JD Doss. The murder weapon? A pickaxe. The murderer? His close friend, 24-year-old Nicholas Camfield. In a shocking twist, Camfield not only killed his victim by repeatedly striking him in the head, he also mutilated, scalped, and defiled his body over the course of days. In one of David Scott's most shocking interviews, Camfield gives a glimpse inside his deranged, murderous mind.

Dylan’s a family-oriented player who got five touchdowns across his first two games in America. Luca’s been CAI’s starting quarterback since eighth grade and has both the brains and the dedication to go far. See just what these players can do in this episode of Country Ball!

programme.title: Country Ball

programme.title: Country Ball

programme.title: World Poker Tour
programme.desc: Season XV of the World Poker Tour concludes with the Monster WPT Tournament of Champions from Seminole Hard Rock Hotel and Casino in Hollywood, Florida. Just six players remain from the 66 WPT Champions Club members that entered, and it is Daniel Weinman in the lead. He’s joined by Michael “The Grinder” Mizrachi, Dylan Wilkerson, Erik Seidel, David Ormsby, and Daniel Santoro. Mizrachi is making back-to-back appearances at the final table of the WPT Tournament of Champions. The winner will be crowned the champion of champions and earn the $381,500 top prize, 2018 Audi S5 Coupe, and luxurious Hublot watch.

programme.title: Jamie Oliver Cooks the Mediterranean
programme.desc: Jamie heads to Greece, to the island of Skopelos, starting on the mainland in Thessaloniki.

programme.title: Jamie Oliver Cooks the Mediterranean
programme.desc: In Tunisia, Jamie meets traditional couscous makers, eats street food, and cooks with local chefs.

programme.title: Jamie Oliver Cooks the Mediterranean
programme.desc: Jamie soaks up inspiration in Spain with tapas, flavor-charged rice dishes, and spectacular seafood.

programme.title: Jamie Oliver Cooks the Mediterranean
programme.desc: Jamie heads to Marseille to explore the seafood, the flavors of Provence, and multicultural dishes.

programme.title: Grand Earth
programme.desc: When most people think of deserts, we think of punishing heat, camels and rattlesnakes. But dig a little deeper, and unbelievable stories emerge, like a bleeding tree, and a desert filled with salt.

programme.title: The Colours of China
programme.desc: Five colours are an integral part of contemporary China and the ancient philosophy of Wu Xing. Each episode takes us to regions where we meet our characters, learn how Wu Xing sits in their lives and explore the landscapes they live in.

programme.title: Top Travel
programme.desc: Get a feel for the ultimate ten out of ten experience as we take you through the most exhilarating places to visit and things to do in Zambia, Top 10 countdown style.

programme.title: V Is For Vino
programme.desc: Languedoc-Roussillon is France's largest wine region and has more organic vineyard land than anywhere else on the planet! Its sheer size means it can produce an enormous variety of wine styles, from sparkling wines to rich whites, spicy reds, and even ...

programme.title: The Neighborhood with Nicole
programme.desc: We explore the West Village in NYC, known to most as one of the most iconic neighborhoods in Manhattan. From sea salt cookies to handmade toys and collectibles we get to know the neighborhood first hand through its innovative locals and shops.

programme.title: The Deadly Companions
programme.desc: An unholy alliance! Marking the feature film debut of one of Hollywoods most influential and widely referenced auteur directors, Sam Peckinpah, The Deadly Companions centers on a redemptive journey to escort a funeral procession through dangerous India...

programme.title: High Lonesome
programme.desc: A young drifter is suspected of murder in this stirring production from writer/director Alan Le May (best known for writing The Searchers). John Drew Barrymore stars as Cooncat, a troubled young man who has to steal to survive. With no friends in West ...

programme.title: The Kansan
programme.desc: Richard Dix stars in this epic of the boisterous and brawling Old West! Wounded in a gun battle with the notorious James gang, John Bonniwell (Dix) wakes up in the hospital to find out hes been elected marshal! He quickly learns that this hot-headed fr...

programme.title: Red Ryder: Roll, Thunder, Roll!
programme.desc: Red Ryder finds two silver conchas, the trademark of bandit El Conejo, at a raided ranch. He reports the raid to Marshal Bill Faugh but tells him that he suspects that El Conejo, a Robin Hood type character, is being framed.

programme.title: Gunsmoke Ranch
programme.desc: Flagg is relocating flood victims to Gunsmoke Ranch. The Three Mesquiteers know Flagg to be a crook and try to warn them. They ignore the warning and improve the land only to find that it has been condemned for a new dam.

programme.title: Part I - The Vision
programme.desc: Back in Texas, Capt. Call organizes a mustang drive to Montana.

programme.title: Part II - The Forge
programme.desc: Gideon's mustang drive encounters problems. Agostina must fend off the unwanted advances of cowboys.

programme.title: Part III - The Legacy
programme.desc: Clara's ranch meets an fiery fate, and she decides to join with Gideon.

programme.title: Part IV - The Passing
programme.desc: A range war is erupting in Montana. Call settles issues with Dunnegan and Newt. Cherokee Jack runs amok.

programme.title: Part I - Leaving
programme.desc: Two former Texas Rangers decide to strike out from their south Texas base and drive a cattle herd to Montana.

programme.title: El Dorado
programme.desc: An old gunfighter, a drifter and a deputy sober up a sheriff to track down killers.

programme.title: Dakota
programme.desc: A woman and her daughter battle a corrupt sheriff who wants to take their farm away.

programme.title: True Grit
programme.desc: Grit Xtra invites you to saddle up and ride alongside the larger-than-life stars of TV and cinema’s most iconic Westerns.

programme.title: North to Alaska
programme.desc: Grit Xtra invites you to saddle up and ride alongside the larger-than-life stars of TV and cinema’s most iconic Westerns.

programme.title: She Wore a Yellow Ribbon
programme.desc: A cavalry captain (John Wayne) completes one last mission in the heart of Indian territory.

programme.title: The Squaw Man (1931)
programme.desc: An English aristocrat accused of a crime he did not commit flees to the American West, where he starts a new life and falls in love with a Native American woman. As he builds a future on the frontier, his past returns to threaten the family he has created, forcing him to face difficult choices between honor, love, and redemption.

programme.title: Spook Town (1944)
programme.desc: A government agent travels to a remote town rumored to be haunted, where a series of mysterious events are being used to frighten residents away from valuable land. As he investigates, he uncovers a scheme by outlaws exploiting superstition to carry out their plans, and works to expose the truth and restore order.

programme.title: Rustlers’ Hideout (1945)
programme.desc: Billy Carson and his sidekick Fuzzy Q. Jones investigate a series of cattle rustlings, uncovering a gang of outlaws operating from a hidden hideout as they work to bring the criminals to justice.

programme.title: Underground Rustlers (1941
programme.desc: The Range Busters investigate a series of cattle rustlings linked to a hidden underground operation, uncovering a gang using secret routes to move stolen livestock as they work to bring the criminals to justice.

programme.title: That Girl – S1:E1: Don’t Just Do Something, Stand There
programme.desc: Aspiring actress Ann Marie moves to New York City to pursue her career, determined to make it on her own despite her father’s concerns. As she searches for opportunities, she gets her first taste of the challenges and independence of show business life.

programme.title: The Bushwhackers 1952
programme.desc: In The Bushwhackers, John Ireland stars as a war-weary Confederate soldier who drifts west seeking peace, only to find violence waiting on the frontier. When ruthless land barons use guns and terror to drive settlers from their homes, he’s forced to take up arms once more. With Lon Chaney Jr. and Lawrence Tierney adding menace and intrigue, this tense Western delivers a hard-hitting tale of greed, justice, and a reluctant hero who can’t outrun the fight for what’s right.

programme.title: Honor Of The Range
programme.desc: After Sheriff Ken puts money in the safe, his brother Clem gives Rawhide the combination. With the money gone the disgruntled townsmen make Boots Sheriff and lock up Ken. Clem, now a prisoner of Rawhide, has a change of heart and sends Ken a message with the outlaw's location. Ken escapes by impersonating the saloon entertainer and rides for the hangout.

programme.title: Apache Rose
programme.desc: Roy is an oil prospector. His efforts to get drilling rights on an old Spanish land grant are countered by gamblers from an off-shore gambling boat determined to control the land (and oil) themselves.

programme.title: Dirty Outlaws
programme.desc: An outlaw masquerades as the son of a blind man in order to find a cache of gold located in a vacated town.

programme.title: Django, Kill!
programme.desc: Various factions, including a half-breed bandit, a gang of homosexual cowboys, and a priest, feud over stolen gold in a surreal town
